description_long: This lantern features a robust, rounded metal base with a deep reddish-brown finish, showing signs of wear and subtle scratches that suggest frequent use. The central body is a clear, cylindrical glass enclosure that houses a visible coiled filament, likely representing an electric or incandescent light source. Two thin, metallic wires arch from the base to the top, forming protective side supports and adding structural stability. The top section is capped with a matching red handle, designed for easy carrying or hanging, and a small metallic knob is present on the base, possibly for adjusting the light or opening the lantern. The overall design is utilitarian with a vintage aesthetic, suitable for both functional and decorative use in urban outdoor or indoor settings. No ornate decorative elements are present, emphasizing practicality and durability.
description: A vintage-style red metal lantern with a clear cylindrical glass enclosure, visible coiled filament, and a sturdy handle for carrying or hanging. The design is utilitarian, with subtle wear and a metallic adjustment knob on the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle, clear glass enclosure, coiled filament, and a metallic knob on the right side of the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the rounded top, the cylindrical glass enclosure, and the metallic knob now visible on the left side of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the handle and glass enclosure visible, but the adjustment knob is not in view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the rounded top and base, showing the metallic knob on the right side of the base.
